description: Quality assertions for the golden run. citation_coverage = sources_cited / sources_collected. all_ids_valid means every src_NNN, fnd_NNN, and ins_NNN referenced anywhere exists in its parent registry. min_citation_coverage is set to 0.0 because the source-collection-only run.py does not synthesize a report; an agent following skills/deep-research.md should produce citation coverage >= 0.7.
